notes: Adds one universal black video handoff so menus, loading labels, and stale frames cannot flash between Tater bumpers, programs, episodes, or tuned channels.
Keeps the blackout in place until mpv reports the incoming video is ready across VOD, VOD TV, The Tube, local media, NZB, Public Access, and OTA playback.
Preserves the visible audio-player interface and quickly releases the transition when playback returns to a menu or an error screen.
